query_normalized: predicting gene regulatory network dynamics from time-series rna-seq data biology
rationale: This paper addresses the core methodology (time series causal discovery) that is fundamental to inferring gene regulatory networks from time-series data, and explicitly mentions biology as an application domain. It satisfies criteria (a) same-mechanism evidence and (d) foundational methodology, as causal discovery from multivariate time series is the canonical approach for GRN inference from RNA-Seq time-series data.
